ex: The teacher asked students to write an analysis of the poem.
et: 선생님은 학생들에게 그 시에 대한 분석문을 작성하도록 요청했다.

me: a way of dealing with something
ex: The teacher tried a new approach to help students understand grammar.

ex: The two paintings have distinct styles, though both were made by the same artist.

ex: It was evident from her smile that she was happy with the result.

et: 연방 정부는 공공 주택에 관한 새 정책을 발표했다.

ex: Her job offers flexible working hours, so she can choose her own schedule.

ex: Students need to focus on their studies during exam week.

ex: She missed the bus and hence arrived late to the meeting.

ex: The train arrives at regular intervals of fifteen minutes.

ex: Always read the label on food products to check the ingredients.

ex: The scientist gave precise measurements to ensure accurate results.

et: 감정적인 결정보다 합리적인 결정을 내리는 것이 중요하다.

me: to move to a new place

me: a way from one place to another

me: a location for a particular purpose

ex: The weather was somewhat cold, but we still enjoyed the walk.

me: a place from which something comes

ex: Her status as a permanent resident allowed her to apply for the job.

ex: A good essay should have a clear structure with an introduction, body, and conclusion.
et: 좋은 에세이는 서론, 본론, 결론으로 구성된 명확한 구조를 가져야 한다.

ex: All students must submit their essays by midnight on Friday.

ex: Make sure you have sufficient time to review your answers before the exam ends.

ex: The dove is a well-known symbol of peace around the world.

et: 많은 가정에서 새해 첫날 대가족이 모여 식사를 하는 것이 전통이다.

ex: Passengers are advised to keep their luggage with them at all times.

me: providing views of attractive natural scenery

et: 경치가 좋은 해안 도로는 매년 수천 명의 관광객을 끌어들인다.

me: an endorsement permitting entry to a country
ex: Travelers must obtain a visa before entering certain countries.
et: 여행자는 특정 국가에 입국하기 전에 비자를 취득해야 한다.
